fixed_versions: Update Fortigate NGFW to V7.4.10 or later version with FSSO TS Agent version 5.0 build 0324 or later version. Contact customer support to receive patch and update information

title: SSA-975644: Multiple Vulnerabilities in Fortigate NGFW on RUGGEDCOM APE1808 Devices
